overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a Western-dressed character exploring a rural house construction site. The character walks through tall grass, approaches a wooden house frame under construction, explores the surrounding work camp with tents and campfire, interacts with supply crates, and departs back into the wilderness. The environment features lush meadows, pine forests, and distant mountains under a dynamic partly cloudy sky.

tall evergreen tree with dense foliage
tall evergreen tree with dense foliage
distant mountain peaks visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense field of tall green grass under a partly cloudy sky. A wooden house frame under construction is visible in the distance, surrounded by scattered pine trees with mountains on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path leading to house construction site

events.description: ground surface transitions from tall grass to dirt path as character approaches the construction site

stacks of wooden planks and construction materials

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from grass to a dirt path, approaching the wooden house frame which grows larger in view. Construction materials including lumber piles and a sawhorse become visible on the sides of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction camp with tents and campfire

events.description: character turns left to navigate around the house frame toward the camp area

smoking campfire with cooking pots nearby
wooden wagon with supplies and barrels
wooden workbench with tools and materials

segments.scene_description: The character turns left around the house frame, entering a work camp area. A canvas tent and smoking campfire appear on the left, while a wooden supply cart stands on the right. The ground is cleared dirt with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: supply storage area at camp edge

events.description: character approaches wooden crates, searches inside them, then turns and walks back into the tall grass

agents.ego_description: approaching supply crates, searching through them for items, then departing back into the wilderness

entered.detail: stacked wooden supply crates with lids
covered wagon loaded with barrels and supplies

segments.scene_description: The character approaches wooden supply crates at the edge of the camp, interacts with them by searching inside, then turns and walks away from the construction site back into the tall grass field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wild meadow into a rural construction camp before returning to the wilderness. It begins with the character walking through a dense field of tall green grass under a partly cloudy sky, moving toward a distant wooden house frame set against a backdrop of pine trees and mountains. As the character transitions from the grass onto a dirt path, the house frame grows larger in view and is flanked by lumber piles and a sawhorse. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left around the structure to reveal a work camp featuring a canvas tent, a smoking campfire, and a wooden supply cart on cleared ground. Finally, after the character approaches and searches through wooden supply crates at the edge of the camp, the camera turns away from the site and recedes back into the tall grass field.
